body.title: Repo graph map walked virtualenvs as first-party source — vendored code outranked the task's files
body.description:
Found 2026-07-09 while re-pointing the stale orientation proof node (T-preexisting-repo-map-second-symbol).

`repo_graph_map._gather_py_files` skipped directories by NAME — {.git, __pycache__, .venv, venv, node_modules, build, dist, .tox} — while its own docstring claimed it 'Skips hidden/venv/site dirs'. This repo's gitignored virtualenv is `test_env/` (2173 .py files), which no name in that list matches.

CONSEQUENCE (measured, not theoretical): every DickSimnel orientation packet led with pip's vendored typing_extensions, pyparsing and pluggy, ranked ABOVE the task's own files. Vendored stdlib-shim code defines the most-referenced identifiers in any tree, so reference-graph centrality hands it the top slots. A weak model told those are the most task-relevant files is being actively misdirected — and read-wandering is precisely the failure the graph map exists to prevent.

SECOND, LATENT BUG on the same line: the skip matched `p.parts` of the ABSOLUTE path, so a checkout living under any directory named `build`, `dist` or `venv` would silently skip its entire source tree and render an empty map (fail-open to the keyword path, orientation lost with no error).

**Fix shipped:** detect a virtualenv by MECHANISM (the `pyvenv.cfg` the interpreter writes) rather than by guessing its name; add site-packages/dist-packages to the skip set; match relative to repo_root, directories only.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/scraps/repo_graph_map.py, tests/inference/test_repo_map_orientation.py
**Design rules:** none apply (no storage, no daemon, no device boundary)
**Scope boundary:** IN — the skip predicate and its proof. OUT — the dead keyword/DB fallback path in orientation_classifier.build_signature_map, which build_graph_map now shadows unconditionally (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** tests/inference/test_repo_map_orientation.py::test_the_graph_map_surfaces_two_symbols_and_ingests_no_vendored_code — hermetic tmp repo containing pkg/foo.py (two matching symbols) and a venv named `test_env/` whose module scores HIGH on the ticket keywords. RED: the vendored symbol is in the packet. GREEN: it is not, and the repo's own files still are (test_the_map_still_ranks_the_repos_own_files guards against over-skipping).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: PROVEN. Virtualenvs detected by mechanism (pyvenv.cfg), not by name; site-packages/dist-packages skipped wherever an environment puts them; skip matched relative to repo_root, directories only — which also fixes the latent absolute-path bug that would have blanked the map for a checkout under any dir named build/dist/venv. Proof: tests/inference/test_repo_map_orientation.py::test_the_graph_map_surfaces_two_symbols_and_ingests_no_vendored_code, red=AssertionError -> green=passed, commit 5fc62692. Verified past the assertion: the LIVE map now leads with bus/envelope.py, identity.py, ticket_store.py, and 'site-packages' appears at no budget. Stub c51711b4 -> impl 5fc62692.
